description: Known on-chain transactions and their expected classifications. Used as a regression test suite for on-chain heuristics (loan detection, sale detection, etc.). Each entry records the ground-truth classification of a transaction so we can verify detectors don't regress.

transactions.description: Modern Liquidium instant-loan repayment — borrower bc1pkpjy8m5q9uhjt9p89ykphla8m8wgjcwp0rraxwzxvr2lv7cw90fs9a6j22 repays the loan against #11299684 and reclaims the inscription. Tap-tree script-path spend of escrow bc1p7525hmk8rjvlsft5kjpeyxhze3yqjra654pupmc3wyh2c6xejm0qss4g9y using the cooperative leaf (270 hex chars, no OP_CSV). Internal pubkey 50929b74…ac0; vout[1]=lender vault P2WSH; vout[2]=Liquidium activation P2TR (bc1papmpmu0…59se9u). ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.5.

Modern Liquidium instant-loan default — lender claims #60578468 from escrow bc1ph2zz5wc7gc7uk082ptp8jq8fte84qptmuv2jajmlvf9hy6a5gx8svzrku5 via the CSV-gated leaf (148 hex chars, contains b275 = OP_CSV+OP_DROP). Internal pubkey 50929b74…ac0; vout shape is the simple inscription-seizure 2-out form (no Liquidium activation output). ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.5.

Loan default — lender 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY claims OMB #10444091 after borrower fails to repay. Taproot script-path spend from escrow bc1p8uykr42qftusy... with OP_CSV OP_DROP (CSV value: e95b4066). Escrow created in 1dddebbf...

Loan default — same lender 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY claims OMB #11299730. Taproot script-path spend from escrow bc1pgjxzdutrp07q... with OP_CSV OP_DROP (CSV value: e8d66166). Escrow created in 385e6e44...

Loan repayment — borrower 3Jod5HUCnXp9Lee... repays 0.308 BTC to lender 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY. Pure BTC transfer, no inscription movement. Original loan from d48eb050... with escrow bc1plr9wj5qmlrf...
Loan unlock — borrower reclaims OMB #60566736 from escrow bc1plr9wj5qmlrf... after repaying the loan (7a0618d9...). Taproot script-path spend with <pubkey> OP_CHECKSIG (no CSV — the unlock path).
Loan origination — OMB #10444091 locked into escrow bc1p8uykr42qftusy... Lender 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY provides ~0.509 BTC to borrower 3DZu42e7rQYyt8vK... Later defaulted in fb8259cd...
Loan origination — OMB #11299730 locked into escrow bc1pgjxzdutrp07q... Lender 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY provides ~0.426 BTC to borrower 3Hs3vSyUpVgKw4tz... Later defaulted in 16459e79...

Loan origination — OMB #60566736 locked into escrow bc1plr9wj5qmlrf... Lender 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY provides ~0.301 BTC to borrower 3Jod5HUCnXp9LeeT... Later repaid in 7a0618d9... and unlocked in 7c3d11e2...
Magisat sale of #11299610 (user-verified externally). 6-in/7-out PSBT. vout[3]=3Ke21os... fee output. ACP signature on vin[2].
Magisat sale of #60576611. Magisat fee at vout[3].
Magisat sale of #83315935. Magisat fee at vout[3].

Magisat sale of #60577519 (5-in/7-out). Magisat fee at vout[3].
Magisat sale of #83314941. Magisat fee at vout[3].
Second Magisat sale of #60577519 (re-listed). Magisat fee at vout[3].
Magisat sale of #60575164 (15-in/7-out, larger consolidation).
Magisat sale of #60563279.
Magisat sale of #60583767. Outlier shape: 4-in/3-out (fee at vout[2] not vout[3]). Useful TP for confirming the rule isn't position-bound.
Magisat sale of #60577536.
Magisat sale of #60576648 (24-in/7-out, large consolidation).
Magisat sale of #60580333.
Magisat sale of #60579029.

Magic Eden sale of #10610550 (block 796440, ~2023-05). Modern ME PSBT listing shape: 4-in/7-out, vin[0..1] buyer dummy P2SH 600-sat utxos, vin[2] inscription P2TR with schnorr 0x83 (SIGHASH_SINGLE|ANYONECANPAY), vin[3] buyer funding. vout[3]=bc1qcq2uv5nk6hec6kvag3wyevp6574qmsm9scjxc2 ME fee (822,500 sats ≈ 2.51%). Earliest fixture for the modern fee address. ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.10.

Magic Eden sale of #10611504 (block 796750, ~2023-05). Modern ME PSBT listing shape: 4-in/7-out, ACP signature on vin[2] inscription, vout[3] ME fee 875,000 sats (~2.51%). First of two recorded ME sales for this inscription.

Magic Eden re-sale of #10611504 (block 796923, ~2023-05). Modern ME PSBT listing shape: 4-in/7-out, ACP signature on vin[2], vout[3] ME fee 997,500 sats (~2.51%). Note vout[1]=bc1ps2gh7q...79vnw matches vin[2] of the previous sale (1f2f75c0...) — same buyer relisted and re-sold within ~3 days.
Magic Eden sale of #10827825 (block 798149, ~2023-06). Modern ME PSBT listing shape: 4-in/7-out, ACP signature on vin[2], vout[3] ME fee 950,000 sats (~2.51%).

Magic Eden sale of #11183491 (block 798599, ~2023-06). Modern ME PSBT listing shape: 6-in/7-out variant (extra buyer-funded P2SH inputs), ACP signature on vin[2] inscription, vout[3] ME fee 700,000 sats (~2.51%). Earliest ME fee-rate fixture matching the 2.5% norm.

Magic Eden sale of #83315561 (block 886371, ~2024-09). Modern ME PSBT listing shape: 4-in/7-out, vin[2] inscription P2TR with schnorr 0x83 ACP, vout[3] ME fee 105,000 sats (~2.51%). Most recent ME fixture; fee address still bc1qcq2uv5n...m9scjxc2 in 2024-09 → ≥16-month tenure since block 796440.

Magic Eden sale of #83295649 (block 885624, ~2024-09). Cooperative SIGHASH_ALL flow (2-in/4-out): vin[0] inscription P2TR signed schnorr SIGHASH_DEFAULT (0x00), vin[1] buyer P2WPKH funding, vout[1] seller P2SH 5,880,900, vout[2] ME fee bc1qcq2uv5n...m9scjxc2 150,000 sats (~2.55%), vout[3] buyer change. User-suspected accept-offer (seller-initiated atomic settle); cannot prove offer-vs-listing direction from chain alone.

Magic Eden sale of #83296358 (block 885756, ~2024-09). Cooperative SIGHASH_ALL flow (2-in/4-out): vin[0] inscription P2TR signed SIGHASH_DEFAULT, vin[1] buyer P2WPKH (same buyer wallet as #83295649). vout[1] seller P2TR 6,992,900 — destination address equals vin[0] address (seller paid back to same address that held the inscription, characteristic of accept-offer flow). vout[2] ME fee 178,750 sats (~2.55%).

Magic Eden sale of #213924 (block 832583, ~2024-03). Cooperative SIGHASH_ALL flow (8-in/4-out): vin[0] inscription P2TR signed schnorr SIGHASH_ALL (0x01), vin[1..7] all from same buyer P2WPKH (multi-utxo consolidation to fund 2.84 BTC sale). vout[1] seller P2SH 284,210,000, vout[2] ME fee P2SH 3P4WqXDbSLRhzo2H6MT6YFbvBKBDPLbVtQ 7,250,000 sats (~2.55%). Older P2SH ME fee-address era (Dec 2023 → May 2024, then rotated out); promoted alongside the primary address 2026-05-05.

Magic Eden sale of #60563128 (block 835705, ~2024-04). Cooperative SIGHASH_ALL flow (2-in/4-out): vin[0] inscription P2TR signed SIGHASH_ALL, vin[1] buyer P2SH 130M sats. vout[1] seller P2SH 107,504,059, vout[2] ME fee P2SH 3P4WqXDbSLRhzo2H6MT6YFbvBKBDPLbVtQ 2,742,425 sats (~2.55%). Older P2SH ME fee-address era; user-suspected accept-offer. Same address as #213924; promoted to live-tag 2026-05-05.

User-flagged ME buy of #11273300 (block 932122) but on-chain shape (2-in/2-out, no fee output, no seller payment, only buyer paying 840 sats fee) is structurally NOT a complete sale. Most likely the inscription-delivery leg of an accept-offer flow whose BTC payment moved in a separate sibling tx. ME UI no longer accessible to verify, so this fixture is recorded as a fingerprint-miss / unverifiable counterexample, NOT a true positive.

Candidate fixture only; not live-tagged until true negatives are confirmed.

Sale of #83309450 confirmed NOT on Magisat (user verified the listing UI). Same bc1papmpmu0... fee shape as 5c2e3ba9. Magisat fingerprint correctly does NOT match.

Counter-example for Phase 4 Liquidium loan-resolution detector: single-leaf taproot tap-tree, internal pubkey 428a... — NOT 9367...d27a. Phase 4 v2 detector misclassified as loan-unlocked; v3 (with Liquidium-pubkey check, ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.2) correctly rejects.

ord.net sale of #60571179 (user-verified externally). 9-in/7-out cooperative SIGHASH_ALL/DEFAULT shape. ord.net fee P2TR bc1pgkfga880836f5kp3m9vvya4m0whva80ddm58r7fyltzp9q8t08rs0rdnet appears at vout[0] (639-sat dust marker) AND vout[3] (real fee, ~2.5%). Seller payment at vout[2]. Recurring buyer-dummy bc1q0h8mu...anch0r at vin[0..1] + vout[4..5]. ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.11.

ord.net sale of #83313913 (user-verified externally). 6-in/7-out cooperative SIGHASH_ALL/DEFAULT shape. Same ord.net fee P2TR at vout[0] (dust marker) + vout[3] (real fee). Seller payment at vout[2]. ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.11.

notes.loan_lifecycle: Loan detection works by finding taproot script-path spends with OP_CSV OP_DROP (hex b175) — the definitive fingerprint of a timelocked escrow. From there we trace backward to origination and forward to repayment/unlock.
notes.lender_3PizFz9: Address 3PizFz9dpz4kSB7jqpdXf6QmVMvkH2xeDY appears as lender across multiple loans. This is NOT hardcoded in the heuristic — it's discovered purely through on-chain pattern matching.
notes.csv_values: CSV values e95b4066 and e8d66166 are Unix timestamps (~May-Jun 2024). Values > 500M are interpreted as timestamps by BIP 68/112. The script pattern is: <csv_timestamp> OP_CSV OP_DROP <pubkey> OP_CHECKSIG.
notes.escrow_pattern: Escrow addresses are taproot outputs (bc1p...) created in origination txs. The taproot commits to two spend paths: key-path (borrower, for unlock) and script-path with CSV timelock (lender, for default claim).
notes.not_a_sale: These loan transactions are NOT sales. The existing sales heuristic correctly skips them (cooperative layer finds no external outputs). The loan heuristic tags them as distinct event types to avoid confusion with marketplace sales.
notes.magisat_fingerprint: Magisat sales are detected by the on-chain fingerprint in src/lib/marketplaceFingerprint.ts: any vout with address 3Ke21osfhEbEryUeqdwAuAY8VKxm5B9uB2 (P2SH fee) AND ≥1 vin with a 65-byte schnorr signature ending in 0x83 (SIGHASH_SINGLE | ANYONECANPAY). 14 TPs plus confirmed TNs in this corpus. Full design + price-extraction rule in ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.7.
notes.ord_net_fingerprint: ord.net sales are detected by the on-chain fingerprint in src/lib/marketplaceFingerprint.ts: any vout with address ∈ ORD_NET_FEE_ADDRS = { bc1pgkfga880836f5kp3m9vvya4m0whva80ddm58r7fyltzp9q8t08rs0rdnet (P2TR, vanity-ends-in 'rdnet') }. Cooperative SIGHASH_ALL/DEFAULT shape only — no ACP path observed. The fee address is paid TWICE in the dominant 7/8-output layout: a 639-sat dust marker at vout[0] and the real ~2.5% fee at vout[3]. detectMarketplace picks the LAST occurrence so vout[feeVoutIdx-1] lands on the seller payment. Promoted 2026-05-05 with 2 user-confirmed OMB TPs anchored by a 50-sample mempool probe of the address (0/50 sweep-out, 100% fee-output, 0 co-occurrence with Magisat or either ME fee address). OMB volume on this marketplace is sparse (a probe across 400 recent OMB sales in ord.net's own feed surfaced exactly the 2 TPs and nothing else — most ord.net feed entries are aggregated from other marketplaces, not settled by ord.net themselves). Full design + price-extraction rule in ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.11.
notes.magic_eden_fingerprint: Magic Eden sales are detected by the on-chain fingerprint in src/lib/marketplaceFingerprint.ts: any vout with address ∈ MAGIC_EDEN_FEE_ADDRS = { bc1qcq2uv5nk6hec6kvag3wyevp6574qmsm9scjxc2 (P2WPKH, primary), 3P4WqXDbSLRhzo2H6MT6YFbvBKBDPLbVtQ (P2SH, secondary, used Dec 2023 → May 2024 then rotated out) }. Two shapes share these addresses: ACP/PSBT-listing (≥1 vin with 65-byte schnorr sig ending 0x83 = SIGHASH_SINGLE|ANYONECANPAY — same structure as Magisat, distinguished by fee address) and cooperative SIGHASH_ALL (no ACP — both parties co-sign atomically, plausibly buy-now or accept-offer). Promoted 2026-05-05 with 10 user-confirmed TPs + an on-chain probe over all 36k OMB candidate txids that found 2,163 secondary-fee txs all matching ME PSBT shapes; mutual-exclusion verified against 283 Satflow + 21 Magisat tagged events in our corpus. Counter-example: #11273300 is a user-flagged ME buy whose on-chain tx has no fee output and no seller payment (only the buyer pays a 840-sat fee) — almost certainly the inscription-delivery leg of an offer accept whose BTC moved in a sibling tx; the live rule correctly fingerprint-misses it. Full design + price-extraction rule in ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.10.
notes.liquidium_internal_pubkey: Phase 4 loan-resolution detection requires the spend's control-block internal pubkey to equal 93674766caa3db9c0f63c4b74f302510c509d6d0ffac9d67214d8f03cb2ed27a. Single-leaf tap-trees with other internal pubkeys (e.g. 428a... in 3bd09bfc) are NOT Liquidium and the v3 detector rejects them. See ONCHAIN_TAGGING.md §2.2 + §4.5.
notes.liquidium_modern_origination_candidate: Twenty-nine user-verified Liquidium OMB loans from 2026 match a narrow instant-loan origination shape: vin[0] spends the inscription P2TR, vin[1..] spend one recurring P2WSH 1-of-2 lender vault, vout[0] keeps the inscription value in a new P2TR collateral holder, vout[1] pays bc1papmpmu0...59se9u, vout[2] pays borrower principal to P2SH, and vout[3] returns lender-vault change. Fifteen additional user-verified loans match close variants: P2SH/P2WPKH/P2TR principal-output variants with the same fee and lender-vault family. This is a candidate fingerprint only; do not live-tag variants until confirmed true negatives or a conservative production policy are added.
